nodes.name: PoPunkouterSoftware.csproj
nodes.summary: ASP.NET Core Web SDK project file for the host server; references the Shared, Client, and Infrastructure projects and pulls in Blazor WASM hosting, Radzen UI, Serilog, OpenTelemetry/Azure Monitor, OpenAPI/Scalar, and Azure Key Vault/Identity packages.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses central package management (versions in Directory.Packages.props) and InternalsVisibleTo to expose internals to the test projects; copies an automation PowerShell script to output.

nodes.name: appsettings.json
nodes.summary: Base runtime configuration for the host server covering Serilog logging, allowed hosts/origins, Azure Table Storage, Application Insights, feature flags, Azure OpenAI, GitHub, the service pinger, incidents, and Key Vault settings.

nodes.name: appsettings.Development.json
nodes.summary: Development environment overrides for the host server, adjusting logging levels, Serilog, Key Vault, Azure Table Storage, feature flags, and Application Insights for local debugging.
